## The Inquisition

![][image1]

### Inquisition Special Rules

**Ordo.** When creating an Inquisition Warband, you must choose one of the Ordos listed below. You can take the special models and battlekit from that Ordo, and follow any additional special rules it has, but you cannot take any models or battlekit from any of the other Ordos.

If a piece of battlekit appears in the Inquisition Armoury as well as your Chamber Militant’s Armoury, you must obey the highest LIMIT between those Armouries. Models can still only be equipped from their own Armoury unless otherwise stated. You can also purchase Campaign Shop battlekit from your Chamber Militant Faction, which can be used by models from that Faction as well as your INQUISITION models, following all normal limits.

**Requisitions.** During a campaign, your Warband begins with 11 Glory, but only 500 credits, and your Credit Threshold is always 200 credits lower than normal for any mission. Whenever you Reinforce during the campaign, you also gain 4 Glory. In a one-off game, you instead have 200 fewer credits and 11 more Glory than normal.

**Shadow Operations.** During a campaign, at the start of each battle, roll a D6 to determine your Shadow Operation for that battle:

1. **Agent Provocateur.** Secretly choose one enemy Elite model. At the end of the battle, reveal your choice. If the chosen model was taken Out of Action, you succeed at this Shadow Operation.  
2. **Ancient Artefact.** At the start of the battle, before deployment, your opponent places a 1” Artefact marker anywhere on the battlefield that is not on Impassable Terrain or completely surrounded by it. As an Action with a Success Roll, any of your models in contact with the marker can attempt to recover that marker. On a success, it is carrying that marker. It can pass the marker to any ally it is within 1” of at the end of any of its Activations. If it is taken Out of Action, a model carrying an Artefact marker drops it at their previous position. At the end of the battle, if one of your models is carrying the Artefact marker, you succeed at this Shadow Operation.  
3. **Diabolical Ritual.** At the start of the battle, your opponent places 3 1” Ritual markers anywhere on the battlefield outside of deployment zones, at least 6” away from any table edge and from each other marker, and not on Impassable Terrain or completely surrounded by it. As an Action that does not require any roll, any of your models in contact with a Ritual marker can attempt to uncover that marker. Roll to determine if the ritual was uncovered: uncovered on a 5+ on a D6 for the first marker, uncovered on a 4+ on a D6 for the second, automatically uncovered for the third. If the ritual was uncovered, you succeed at this Shadow Operation.  
4. **Informant.**  At the start of the battle, before deployment, your opponent places a 1” Informant marker anywhere on the battlefield outside of deployment zones, at least 6” away from any table edge, and not on Impassable Terrain or completely surrounded by it. At the end of the battle, if any of your models is in contact with the Informant marker, you succeed at this Shadow Operation.  
5. **Sympathiser.** At the end of the battle, if you have one or more models in your opponent’s deployment zone, you succeed at this Shadow Operation.  
6. **Threat of Uprising.** At the end of the battle, if you have more models in your own deployment zone than your opponent, you succeed at this Shadow Operation.

If you succeed at your Shadow Operation, one of your Elite models of your choice gains 1 additional XP.

### Inquisition Patrons

Your patron must be the Lord Inquisitor Shared Patron.

### Inquisition Unique Battlekit

* **Digital Weapons.** HEAVY, TWO-HANDED  
  * Focused Strike: 24”, \+1 INJURY DICE, FIRE  
  * Scatter Shot: 12”, BLAST 2”, ASSAULT, SHRAPNEL

### Inquisition Campaign Shop

During a campaign, these pieces of battlekit are available only when your Warband is specifically allowed to purchase them.

* **Blackshroud (3 Glory, Inquisitor Only).** Injury rolls made against the wearer have \-1 DICE.  
* **Daemon Weapon (3 Glory, Inquisitor Only, Ordo: Malleus Only).** Melee, \+2 INJURY DICE, PSYCHIC  
* **Ignis Judicium (4 Glory, Inquisitor Only, Ordo: Hereticus Only).** 12”, IGNORE ARMOUR, \+1 INJURY DICE at short range (or in melee) or against a target with the DAEMON or PSYCHIC Keyword, RISKY, PISTOL  
* **Malus Codicium (4 Glory, Inquisitor Only, Ordo: Malleus Only).** While the equipped model is within 6” of a friendly Daemonhost model, that model has \+1 INJURY DICE with all attacks.  
* **Relic Digital Weapons (2 Glory, Inquisitor Only).** TWO-HANDED  
  * Focused Strike: 24”, \+1 INJURY DICE, FIRE  
  * Scatter Shot: 12”, BLAST 2”, ASSAULT, SHRAPNEL  
* **Universal Anathema (6 Glory, Inquisitor Only, Ordo: Xenos Only).** When the equipped model hits an enemy that does not have the ARTIFICIAL or VEHICLE Keyword with a melee attack, that attack causes an additional BLOOD MARKER if it causes any BLOOD MARKERS at all.  
* **Walking Throne (2 Glory, LIMIT: 1, Inquisitor Only, Ordo: Hereticus Only).** The equipped model is mounted on a throne atop a walking machine. The rider gains the FEAR, LARGE, and VEHICLE Keywords, is always treated as being 2” above its current location, and gains a movement speed of 8”/Infantry, but it cannot benefit from Cover.

### Inquisition Elites

#### 1 Inquisitor (Cost: 55 Credits \+15 for rosarius)

| Name | Movement | Ranged | Melee | Armour | Base |
| :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- |
| Inquisitor | 6”/Infantry | \+2 | \+2 | 0 | 25-32mm |

**Battlekit**  
The Inquisitor is equipped with a Rosarius, included in its cost. It can be equipped with any other weapons, armour, or equipment from the Inquisition Armoury.

**Upgrades**  
When recruited, the Inquisitor can be given up to one of the following upgrades.

* **Duelist.** At a cost of \+10 credits, whenever an enemy Charges the Inquisitor, the Inquisitor can make a single melee attack with a non-HEAVY weapon against that enemy before it takes any further actions.  
* **Frightening Reputation.** At a cost of \+5 credits, the Inquisitor gains the FEAR Keyword.  
* **Great Strength.** At a cost of \+10 credits, the Inquisitor gains the STRONG Keyword.  
* **Pistoleer.** At a cost of \+10 credits, the Inquisitor has the following benefits while armed with Ranged Weapons with the PISTOL Keyword:  
  * If it is equipped with 2 Weapons with the PISTOL Keyword, it can take a Shoot ACTION with one and then immediately take a Shoot ACTION with the other.  
  * Add the ASSAULT and IGNORE OFF-HAND WEAPON Keywords to any weapons that have the PISTOL Keyword.  
* **Psyker.** At a cost of \+5 credits, the Inquisitor gains the PSYKER 1 Keyword. Select a Shared Psychic Discipline. The Inquisitor may purchase up to four powers from that Discipline, and must purchase at least one. It can only use Psychic Powers while wielding a PSYCHIC weapon.

**Keywords**  
ELITE, INQUISITION, LEADER, NEGATE FEAR, TOUGH

#### 0-1 Interrogator (Cost: 50 Credits)

| Name | Movement | Ranged | Melee | Armour | Base |
| :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- |
| Interrogator | 6”/Infantry | \+1 | \+1 | 0 | 25-32mm |

**Battlekit**  
The Interrogator can be equipped with any weapons, armour, or equipment from the Inquisition Armoury.

**Abilities**

* **Inquisitorial Tomes.** As an Action that requires no roll, remove any Tomeskull marker you have on the battlefield, then you can place a Tomeskull marker anywhere the Interrogator can see within 12” of it. Then choose one of the following:  
  * **Denunciation:** Until the start of the Interrogator’s next Activation, other friendly models within 3” of the Interrogator or a Tomeskull marker have \+1 DICE to Hit with all attacks.  
  * **Sanctification:** Until the start of the Interrogator’s next Activation, enemies within 3” of the Interrogator or a Tomeskull marker have \-1 DICE to Hit with all attacks.

**Keywords**  
ELITE, INQUISITION

#### 0-1 Mystic (Cost: 50 Credits \+cost of weapon and powers)

| Name | Movement | Ranged | Melee | Armour | Base |
| :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- |
| Mystic | 6”/Infantry | \+1 | \+1 | 0 | 25-28mm |

**Battlekit**  
The Mystic can be equipped with any weapons, armour, or equipment from the Inquisition Armoury. It must be equipped with at least one PSYCHIC weapon.

When you recruit the Mystic, select one Shared Psychic Disciplines. The Mystic may purchase up to four powers from that Discipline, and must purchase at least one.

**Abilities**

* **Psychic Beacon.** Allies with DEEP STRIKE or INFILTRATOR can be deployed fully within 3” of this model, even if they are too close to an enemy and/or are visible to an enemy. They still cannot be deployed within close combat range of any enemy. A model deployed with DEEP STRIKE in this way is not adjusted by D3” as normal.

**Keywords**  
ELITE, INQUISITION, PSYKER 1

### Inquisition Troops

#### Acolyte (Cost: 45 Credits)

| Name | Movement | Ranged | Melee | Armour | Base |
| :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- |
| Acolyte | 6”/Infantry | \+1 | \+1 | 0 | 25mm |

**Battlekit**  
The Acolyte can be equipped with any weapons, armour, or equipment from the Inquisition Armoury.

**Abilities**

* **Experienced.** The Acolyte begins with one Campaign Skill, even though it is not Elite. Choose two of the available Skill Charts and roll 2D6 on each. Reroll results of 2 or 12\. The Acolyte has your choice of one of the rolled skills.

**Keywords**  
INQUISITION

#### 0-2 Jokaero Weaponsmith (Cost: 55 Credits)

| Name | Movement | Ranged | Melee | Armour | Base |
| :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- |
| Jokaero Weaponsmith | 6”/Infantry | \+1 | \+1 | 0 | 25-28mm |

**Battlekit**  
The Jokaero Weaponsmith can be equipped with any weapons, armour, or equipment from the Inquisition Armoury.

**Abilities**

* **Inconceivable Customisation.** At the start of each battle, roll 1D3 and apply the corresponding effect for the duration of the battle.  
  * 1\. Augmented Targeting: The Jokaero Weaponsmith has \+1 DICE to Hit with ranged attacks.  
  * 2\. Augmented Penetration: The Jokaero Weaponsmith’s ranged attacks have ARMOUR PIERCING 1, stacking with other ARMOUR PIERCING Keywords.  
  * 3\. Defence Orbs: The Jokaero Weaponsmith treats Down results as Minor Hits (does not affect Down results that replace Out of Action via TOUGH Keyword).

**Keywords**  
INQUISITION, STRONG

### Ordo: Hereticus

* **Chamber Militant: Sisters of Battle.** You can recruit up to 1 Dogmata or 1 Palatine, up to 3 Battle Sisters (max 1 Retributor and 1 Zephyrim/Seraphim), and up to 4 Repentia from the Adepta Sororitas Faction.  
* **Miraculous Hunt.** You gain the Miracles special rule of the Sisters of Battle Faction.

### Ordo: Malleus

* **Chamber Militant: Grey Knights.** You can recruit up to 1 Chaplain or 1 Librarian, up to 2 Astartes, and up to 1 Terminator from the Adeptus Astartes Faction, using the Grey Knights Warband Variant rules, including their replacement for the And They Shall Know No Fear special rule.  
* **Dominus and Sanctus Disciplines.** When choosing Psychic Disciplines for your INQUISITION PSYKER models, you can choose the Dominus and/or Sanctus Disciplines from the Grey Knights Warband Variant of the Adeptus Astartes Faction in place of another Discipline.  
* **Bound Daemonhost.** You can recruit up to 1 Daemonhost, described below, as a Troop in your Warband.

#### 0-1 Daemonhost (Cost: 135 Credits)

| Name | Movement | Ranged | Melee | Armour | Base |
| :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- |
| Daemonhost | 6”/Flying | \+1 | \+2 | 0 | 25-32mm |

**Battlekit**  
The Daemonhost cannot be equipped with any weapons, armour, or equipment, but knows the following Psychic Powers that provide it with attacks:

* **Energy Torrent.** 24”, IGNORE COVER, BLAST 2”, PSYCHIC, RISKY  
* **Unholy Gaze.** 18”, ARMOUR PIERCING 1, PSYCHIC, RISKY, STUN  
* **Warp Grasp.** Melee, IGNORE ARMOUR, PSYCHIC, RISKY

**Abilities**

* **Daemonic Speed.** The Daemonhost has \+1 DICE to all Dash Success Rolls.  
* **Malefic Warding (PSYCHIC).** While the Daemonhost is within 8” of a friendly Inquisitor, injuries rolled against the Daemonhost have \-1 DICE.  
* **Re-Knit Host Form (PSYCHIC).** At the start of the Daemonhost’s Activation, remove D3 BLOOD MARKERS from it.

**Keywords**  
DAEMON, FLYING, INQUISITION, NO PROMOTION, PSYKER, TOUGH

### Ordo: Xenos

* **Chamber Militant: Deathwatch.** You can recruit up to 1 Apothecary or 1 Chaplain, and up to 4 Astartes (max 2 total Assault Marines, Bladeguards, Devastators, and Vanguards) from the Adeptus Astartes Faction, using the Deathwatch Warband Variant rules, including their replacement for the And They Shall Know No Fear special rule.  
* **Xenopurge Discipline.** When choosing Psychic Disciplines for your INQUISITION PSYKER models, you can choose the Xenopurge Discipline from the Deathwatch Warband Variant of the Adeptus Astartes Faction in place of another Discipline.  
* **Xenos Artifacts.** Add the following Xenos weapons to your Inquisition and Astartes Armouries, but you can purchase only a total of up to 4 of these weapons, and only up to 1 of each.  
  * From the Aeldari Battlekit List: Avenger Shuriken Catapult, Death Spinner, Mist Staff, Plasma Grenades, Shuriken Cannon, Shuriken Catapult, Shuriken Pistol  
  * From the Drukhari Battlekit List: Agonizer, Splinter Cannon, Splinter Pistol, Splinter Rifle,   
  * From the Leagues of Votann Battlekit List: Ion Blaster, Ion Pistol, Magna Rail Rifle, Volkanite Disintegrator  
  * From the Necrons Battlekit List: Gauss Blaster, Gauss Cannon, Gauss Flayer, Gauss Reaper, Tesla Cannon, Voidblade  
  * From the T’au Empire Battlekit List: Bladestave, EMP Grenades, Honor Blade, Photon Grenades, Pulse Blaster, Pulse Carbine, Pulse Rifle, Rail Rifle

  In addition, you can take up to 1 piece of battlekit from the Aeldari, Drukhari, Leagues of Votann, or T’au Empire Campaign Shop as if it were your own, which can be equipped only by your Inquisitor, and follows all other limits.

### Ordo: Minoris

* **Chamber Militant: Adeptus Arbites.** You can recruit up to 1 Sergeant, up to 5 Patrolmen, up to 5 Rookies, up to 2 Hardcase Cyber Mastiffs, and up to 1 Sanctioner Automata from the Palanite Enforcers Gang of the Necromunda Gang Faction, representing Adeptus Arbites. They retain all of their Gang-specific special rules, and can be equipped from the Inquisition Armoury in addition to their normal options.

### 

### Inquisition Mercenaries

You can hire the following mercenaries.

#### Assassinorum Mercenaries

**Max 1 per Warband:**

* 0-1 Adamus Assassin (Cost: 6 Glory)  
* 0-1 Callidus Assassin (Cost: 6 Glory)  
* 0-1 Culexus Assassin (Cost: 6 Glory)  
* 0-1 Eversor Assassin (Cost: 6 Glory)  
* 0-1 Vanus Infocyte (Cost: 6 Glory)  
* 0-1 Venenum Assassin (Cost: 6 Glory)  
* 0-1 Vindicare Assassin (Cost: 6 Glory)

#### Ecclesiarchy Mercenaries

* 0-2 Arco-Flagellant (Cost: 3 Glory)  
* 0-1 Death Cult Assassin (Cost: 4 Glory)  
* 0-1 Dialogus (Cost: 4 Glory) Ordo: Hereticus Only  
* 0-1 Hospitaller (Cost: 3 Glory) Ordo: Hereticus Only  
* 0-1 Ministorum Priest (Cost: 3 Glory)  
* 0-1 Ministorum Vindictor (Cost: 3 Glory)  
* 0-1 Questkeeper (Cost: 4 Glory)  
* 0-1 Salvationist (Cost: 2 Glory)

#### Law Mercenaries

* 0-1 Arbites Enforcer (Cost: 3 Glory) Unavailable to Ordo: Minoris  
* 0-1 Hardcase Cyber Mastiff (Cost: 3 Glory) Unavailable Ordo: Minoris  
* 0-1 Sister of Silence (Cost: 4 Glory) Unavailable to Warband led by PSYKER

#### Mars Mercenaries

* 0-1 Autosavant (Cost: 3 Glory)  
* 0-1 Combat Servitor (Cost: 3 Glory)  
* 0-1 Gun Servitor (Cost: 3 Glory)  
* 0-1 Magos Errant (Cost: 4 Glory)

#### Military Mercenaries

* 0-1 Deathworld Veteran (Cost: 4 Glory)  
* 0-1 Penal Legionnaire (Cost: 3 Glory)  
* 0-1 Ratling Sniper (Cost: 3 Glory)  
* 0-1 Ratling Tankstopper (Cost: 4 Glory)

#### Space Marine Mercenaries

* 0-1 Lone Primaris Marine (Cost: 4 Glory)

**Max 1 per Warband:**

* 0-1 Black Templar Crusader (Cost: 5 Glory)  
* 0-1 Blood Angels Sanguinary Guard (Cost: 6 Glory)  
* 0-1 Dark Angel Knight (Cost: 5 Glory)  
* 0-1 Grey Knight Paladin (Cost: 6 Glory)  
* 0-1 Imperial Fist Heavy Gunner (Cost: 5 Glory)  
* 0-1 Iron Hands Heavy Gunner (Cost: 5 Glory)  
* 0-1 Raven Guard Corvus Marine (Cost: 5 Glory)  
* 0-1 Space Wolves Wulfen (Cost: 6 Glory)  
* 0-1 White Scars Outrider (Cost: 6 Glory)

#### Other Imperial Mercenaries

* 0-1 Astropath (Cost: 2 Glory)  
* 0-1 Canid Companion (Cost: 2 Glory)  
* 0-1 Navigator (Cost: 3 Glory)  
* 0-1 Ogryn Bodyguard (Cost: 5 Glory)  
* 0-1 Rejuvenat Adept (Cost: 2 Glory)  
* 0-1 Sanctioned Psyker (Cost: 3 Glory)
